name: Upstash
description: Upstash is a serverless Redis and Kafka platform. Use the management API to create and manage Redis databases, and the REST API to execute Redis commands over HTTP.

capabilities.name: databases_create
capabilities.description: Create a new serverless Redis database.

capabilities.name: databases_get
capabilities.description: Get details of a Redis database.

capabilities.name: databases_reset_password
capabilities.description: Reset password for a Redis database.

capabilities.name: databases_get_stats
capabilities.description: Get usage statistics for a Redis database.

capabilities.name: redis_execute_command
capabilities.description: Execute any Redis command over HTTP.

capabilities.name: redis_pipeline
capabilities.description: Execute multiple Redis commands in a batch.

capabilities.name: redis_transaction
capabilities.description: Execute commands atomically as a transaction.
